ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the cities table */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the counties table */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the states table */,
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the postal_codes table */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city or county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_senate_majority" TEXT /* Majority party in the state senate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the states table */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the counties table */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* The actual postal code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the cities table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user_roles table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
